The '''sink-crab''' was a crustacean native to [[Bestine IV/Legends|Bestine IV]]. It used bladders that filled with air to propel itself. While living on Bestine IV, future [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Jek Tono Porkins/Legends|Jek Tono Porkins]] hunted these creatures in his [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope|first edition]] of ''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]'', they were referred to as "flink-crabs" in Porkins' biography. It was changed to "sink-crabs" for the [[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope (Second Edition)|second edition]].
